questions.statement:
<p>Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank.</p>

<p>There was utter _________ after the explosion.&nbsp;</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate synonym of the word given in brackets to fill in the blank.</p>

<p>He returned from America when he heard that his father was ______ (indisposed) and wanted to see him.</p>

<p><span style="font-weight: bolder;">Directions: Each of the following sentences in this section has a blank space and is followed by four choices. Select the most appropriate choice to fill in the blank and mark your response accordingly.</span></p>

<p>Due to the ___ nature of the material, the chemistry lecture was particularly challenging.</p>
questions.explanation:
The correct answer is Option 1 i.e. esoteric.
Key Points
  • The sentence suggests that the material's complexity made the chemistry lecture particularly challenging.
  • The word "esoteric" means intended for or likely to be understood by only a small number of people with a specialized knowledge or interest.
  • The options "exoteric," "elementary," and "common" do not fit the context as they imply concepts that are either widely known or simplistic, which contrasts with the statement's indication of challenging material.
  • Understanding the meaning of "esoteric" in this context helps to clarify why the chemistry lecture was particularly challenging.
Therefore, the correct answer is- esoteric.
Additional Information
  • Exoteric refers to ideas or teachings that are accessible and understandable to the general public.
  • Elementary means basic and uncomplicated, which can be easily understood.
  • Common indicates something usual, not difficult, or not specialized.

<p>Masquerade</p>
options: To run in a marathon race /

questions.statement:
<p>In the following question given below, a sentence is provided with two blanks. Choose the correct combination of words that fit into the corresponding blanks.</p>

<p>___________ for tests on the immuniser developed in India will serve to _______ the efficacy, safety and consistency between vaccine batches.</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>Condone</p>

<p>Choose the appropriate word to complete the given sentence</p>

<p>Mr. and Mrs. Joshi go for a&nbsp; ____&nbsp; walk just before dinner.&nbsp;</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined words in the given sentence.</strong></p>

<p>The shells that were collected from the seashore are kept on the shelf as a <u>reminder of the place.</u></p>

<p>Select the word that is similar in meaning (SYNONYM) to the word given below</p>

<p>Specious</p>

<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">In the following question, out of the four alternatives, select the word opposite in meaning to the word given.</span></p>

<p>Abrupt</p>
